name: audit_access_logs
description: Aggregate and analyze access logs to detect anomalous access patterns.

parameters.name: encrypt_sensitive_data
parameters.description: Generate encryption plan and optionally encrypt a sample dataset with provided key material (dry-run by default).

parameters.name: simulate_ddos_attack
parameters.description: Simulate a controlled DDoS traffic pattern against an isolated test endpoint (lab-only, requires authorization).

parameters.name: generate_iac_template
parameters.description: Create an IaC template (Terraform/Bicep) for a target architecture with secure defaults.

parameters.name: monitor_container_health
parameters.description: Collect container health metrics and produce an alerting baseline for runtime anomalies.

parameters.name: automate_patch_management
parameters.description: Plan and schedule patch rollouts across environments with canary windows and rollback plans. Authorization required for production runs.

parameters.name: predict_system_failures
parameters.description: Analyze metrics and logs to predict likely system/component failures with confidence scores.

parameters.name: generate_ctf_lab
parameters.description: Build a capture-the-flag lab environment with seeded challenges and scoring. Authorization required for resource provisioning.

parameters.name: run_ai_code_review
parameters.description: Perform an automated AI-assisted code review and produce a prioritized list of suggested fixes.

parameters.name: simulate_malware_behavior
parameters.description: Execute behavior simulation of a sample in a hermetically-isolated lab and report indicators; lab-only and requires authorization.

parameters.name: reverse_engineer_binary
parameters.description: High-level guidance and automated extraction of strings and imports from a binary (no automatic execution).

parameters.name: monitor_network_traffic
parameters.description: Collect and summarize network flow telemetry for anomaly detection and threat hunting.
